description: NamingEnricher — naming-style classification + name_length, on forgeql-pub.frozen (node_id.rs).

cases.name: snake_case_function
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='parse_offset' WHERE naming='snake_case' LIMIT 5

cases.name: pascal_case_type
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='NodeOffsetSplit' WHERE naming='PascalCase' LIMIT 5

cases.name: upper_snake_const
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='DEFAULT_SEGMENT_PREFIX_HEX' WHERE naming='UPPER_SNAKE' LIMIT 5

cases.name: name_length_filter
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='parse_offset' WHERE name_length=12 LIMIT 5

cases.name: negative_snake_not_pascal
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='parse_offset' WHERE naming='PascalCase' LIMIT 5
